mapper.select:
SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS name, u.email AS email, u.login_provider AS provider, DATE_FORMAT(u.created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') AS joinedAt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trip_members tm WHERE tm.user_id = u.id) AS tripCount, u.status AS status FROM users u
ORDER BY u.created_at DESC LIMIT #{cond.offset}, #{cond.limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS name, u.email AS email, u.login_provider AS provider, DATE_FORMAT(u.created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') AS joinedAt, u.status AS status FROM users u WHERE u.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trip_members WHERE user_id = #{id}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(e.amount), 0) FROM expenses e JOIN trip_members tm ON e.payer_member_id = tm.id WHERE tm.user_id = #{id}

SELECT t.id AS id, t.name AS name, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(t.start_date, '%Y.%m.%d'), ' ~ ', DATE_FORMAT(t.end_date, '%Y.%m.%d')) AS period, CASE WHEN latest.settlement_status IS NULL THEN 'live' WHEN latest.settlement_status = 'in_progress' THEN 'settle' ELSE 'done' END AS status FROM trip_members tm JOIN trips t ON t.id = tm.trip_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT s1.trip_id, s1.status AS settlement_status FROM settlements s1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT trip_id, MAX(created_at) AS max_created FROM settlements GROUP BY trip_id ) s2 ON s1.trip_id = s2.trip_id AND s1.created_at = s2.max_created ) latest ON latest.trip_id = t.id WHERE tm.user_id = #{id} ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
